SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE s.County = 'Alameda'	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate, f."School Name" FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f."School Type" = 'Continuation High Schools' ORDER BY eligible_free_rate ASC LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Zip FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1 AND f."District Name" = 'Fresno County Office of Education'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT * FROM schools WHERE CDSCode = '19648731936749'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE f."Charter School (Y/N)" = 1  AND s.OpenDate > '2000-01-01'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT Virtual FROM schools LIMIT 10	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT NumTstTakr FROM satscores	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode WHERE ss.NumTstTakr = (SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr) FROM satscores WHERE NumGE1500 > 0) AND ss.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT SUM(NumTstTakr) AS total_test_takers FROM satscores WHERE cds IN (SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE "FRPM Count (K-12)" = 4419)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CharterFundedCount  FROM satscores s  JOIN schools sch ON s.cds = sch.CDSCode  WHERE s.AvgScrMath > 560 AND sch.FundingType = 'Directly funded'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT "FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"  FROM frpm  WHERE CDSCode = '43696414332904'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT CDSCode FROM frpm WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" + "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 500	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT MAX(eligible_free_rate) AS highest_eligible_free_rate FROM (SELECT "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS eligible_free_rate, f.CDSCode FROM frpm f JOIN (SELECT cds, (NumGE1500 * 1.0 / NumTstTakr) AS excellence_rate FROM satscores WHERE NumTstTakr > 0) s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE s.excellence_rate > 0.3)	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT Phone FROM schools WHERE CDSCode IN ('30664313030616', '19642121931880', '43694684334421')	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)", s.NCESSchool  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  ORDER BY f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" DESC  LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.District, AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE s.StatusType = 'Active'  GROUP BY s.District  ORDER BY AvgReadingScore DESC  LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM satscores s JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode WHERE f."County Name" = 'Alameda' AND s.NumTstTakr < 100	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, ss.AvgScrWrite, s.CharterNum  FROM satscores ss  JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode  WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL  ORDER BY ss.AvgScrWrite DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE f."County Name" = 'Fresno' AND f."Charter Funding Type" = 'Directly funded' AND s."NumTstTakr" <= 250	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT s.Phone FROM satscores ss JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode ORDER BY ss.AvgScrMath DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM frpm WHERE "County Name" = 'Amador' AND "Low Grade" = '9' AND "High Grade" = '12'	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT COUNT(*) AS school_count  FROM frpm f  WHERE f."County Name" = 'Los Angeles'  AND f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" > 500  AND f."FRPM Count (K-12)" < 700	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.County, ss.NumTstTakr  FROM schools s  JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds  WHERE s.County = 'Contra Costa'  AND ss.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL  ORDER BY ss.NumTstTakr DESC	----- bird -----	california_schools

SELECT s.School, s.Street, s.StreetAbr, s.City, s.Zip, s.State  FROM frpm f  JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode  WHERE (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") > 30	----- bird -----	california_schools
SELECT DISTINCT f."School Name" FROM frpm f JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds WHERE ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") > 0.1 AND s.NumGE1500 > 0	----- bird -----	california_schools
